meaning: n.重量,重要性,分量vt.举起试重量,举起vi.重达
examples: Goldstone wished Tom Hill were there to add heft to his argument.
The 155-page American edition of the book packs the intellectual heft of a much longer text.
The heft of the concrete walls is offset by the riotous plantings of Texas elderberry, coralberry, and wax myrtles.
He believes Acer can shake up the market regardless, given its corporate heft and strong brand.
Let us not forget the fan from whom the game derives its financial heft.
